page_summary:
A scanned front page from The Kilgore News Herald (Kilgore, Texas), dated Thursday, August 22, 1991. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

Kilgore is a small city in East Texas, and its News Herald covering Dick-related content demonstrates the extent to which Dick's cultural influence spread into unexpected corners of American media. By 1991, Dick's posthumous reputation was growing steadily. As a front-page clipping, this item may contain a particularly prominent piece of coverage.
